subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which historic fort is known for its unique architecture and cultural significance in Rajasthan?
question_hi: राजस्थान में विशेष तथा कला के प्रतिष्ठित विशेषताओं के रूप में जाने वाले एक कोणती पोल क्या है?
explanation_en: Amer Fort is a historic fort and a popular tourist destination known for its unique architecture and cultural significance in Rajasthan.
explanation_hi: आमर विधान, राजस्थान के आयतनों का क्या उपयोग करता है।
आमर विधान, राजस्थान के आयतनों का उपयोग करता है।

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which ancient city was the capital of Rajasthan before Jaipur?
question_hi: राजस्थान के पहले क्या नगर था?
explanation_en: Jodhpur was the capital of Rajasthan before Jaipur. It was founded by Rao Jodha in 1459 and is known for its blue-colored buildings and historic significance.
explanation_hi: झोधुपुर राजस्थान के पहले क्या मन्नार था?
